name: Create Weather Dashboard & Thermometer
description: Create a 2-page custom weather tracking flipchart in ActivInspire. The first page, titled 'Today's Weather', must include a thermometer diagram consisting of a bulb and stem with degree labels for 0, 32, 50, 70, and 100, as well as 'Sunny' and 'Rainy' weather conditions with representative icons. The second page, titled 'Weekly Log', must include headers for 'Mon', 'Tue', 'Wed', 'Thu', and 'Fri' with a horizontal line separating the headers. Save the completed file to /home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts/weather_tracker.flipchart
